analyst.description: Collects requirements, scope, risks, and backlog without changing code

architect.description: Designs boundaries, data model, ADRs, and implementation plans without editing code

coder.description: Implements agreed tasks with tests and docs, using careful incremental changes

qa.description: Reviews quality, finds edge cases, and expands tests without changing production code by default

writer.description: Maintains README, ADRs, guides, and product docs with clear technical writing

kickoff.description: Start the project with requirements, architecture, roadmap, and testing strategy
kickoff.template: Act as the project lead for this repository. First read AGENTS.md and all docs. Then produce or update: docs/requirements.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/testing-strategy.md, docs/roadmap.md, and docs/adr/adr-0001-initial-architecture.md. Do not write production code. Focus on MVP scope, non-goals, architecture boundaries, risks, and a prioritized backlog.

implement.description: Implement one backlog item with tests and docs
implement.template: Read AGENTS.md and existing docs first. Then implement backlog item: $ARGUMENTS. Before editing files, summarize the plan, affected modules, and tests to add. After implementation, run relevant checks, update docs, and summarize what changed and what remains.

test.description: Run Rust checks and summarize failures
test.template: Run the relevant Rust quality commands for this repository, summarize failures, identify the most likely root causes, and propose concrete next fixes. Prefer cargo test, cargo clippy, and cargo fmt checks where applicable.

docs-sync.description: Sync README, ADRs, and docs with the current codebase
docs-sync.template: Read AGENTS.md, README.md, and docs/**/*.md. Compare them to the current codebase and architecture. Update stale documentation, add missing explanations, and list any unresolved documentation gaps.
